{% endblock %} {% block vue_data %} {{ block.super }} shareUrl: '', {% endblock %} {% block vue_mounted %} {{ block.super }} this.shareUrl = window.location.href; {% endblock %} {% block vue_methods %} {{ block.super }} copyShareLink() { navigator.clipboard.writeText(this.shareUrl).then(() => { ElementPlus.ElMessage({ message: '链接已成功复制到剪贴板', type: 'success', plain: true, offset: 80, }); }).catch(err => { ElementPlus.ElMessage.error('复制失败，请手动选取链接复制'); }); }, {% endblock %}
